issues.check: Task IDs in tasks.md match IDs in phase docs
issues.description: T092 in phase4_interface_layer.md incorrectly referenced US-15 (Health Check Endpoint) instead of US-14 (Chat API Endpoint). T092 is the SSE streaming endpoint which belongs to the Chat API, not the health check.
issues.fix_description: Changed T092 User Stories from 'US-14, US-15' to 'US-14' in phase4_interface_layer.md

issues.check: No monolithic phases (>20 tasks in a single phase)
issues.description: Phase 4 (Interface Layer) contained 22 tasks, exceeding the 20-task limit. T095 (Zod Validation on All Routes) and T110 (Indexing Status Response Formatting) were small verification tasks (30min and 15min) that could be absorbed into their parent implementation tasks.
issues.fix_description: Merged T095 acceptance criteria and implementation notes into T091 (POST /api/chat endpoint). Merged T110 acceptance criteria and implementation notes into T108 (GET /api/repos endpoint). Removed T095 and T110 as standalone tasks. Updated all cross-references in tasks.md, user_stories.md, features.md, and progress.md. Phase 4 now has 20 tasks. Total task count updated from 88 to 86.

completeness.prd_features_mapped: PASS — All V1 PRD features (Sections 5-8, 11-15) map to F1-F12
completeness.features_have_stories: PASS — All 12 features have 1+ user stories
completeness.stories_have_criteria: PASS — All 21 stories have 3-7 acceptance criteria (range: 4-6)
completeness.features_have_tasks: PASS — All 12 features map to specific tasks
completeness.tasks_in_phase_docs: PASS — All 86 tasks have corresponding entries in phase docs
completeness.phase_evaluation_criteria: PASS — All 6 phase docs have Phase Evaluation Criteria
completeness.task_evaluation_checklists: PASS — All 86 tasks have Evaluation Checklists
completeness.non_goals_not_covered: PASS — None of the 16 non-goals are accidentally implemented

consistency.feature_dependency_no_cycles: PASS — DAG verified: F10,F12,F8,F7 → F6,F5,F3 → F2,F4 → F9 → F1,F11
consistency.task_dependency_no_cycles: PASS — All dependencies reference earlier task numbers
consistency.task_numbering_sequential: PASS — Sequential within phases with intentional inter-phase gaps
consistency.feature_ids_match: PASS — F1-F12 consistent across features.md, user_stories.md, tasks.md
consistency.user_story_ids_match: PASS — US-01 through US-21 consistent across all documents
consistency.task_ids_match: PASS — All task IDs match between tasks.md and phase docs (after T092 fix)
consistency.phase_count_matches: PASS — README lists 6 phase docs matching actual files
consistency.total_task_count_matches: PASS — tasks.md says 86, actual count is 86

traceability.forward: PASS — Every PRD requirement traces to feature → story → task → phase doc
traceability.backward: PASS — Every task traces back to story → feature → PRD section (infra tasks exempt)
traceability.no_orphan_tasks: PASS — All tasks linked to features or are legitimate infrastructure tasks
traceability.no_orphan_stories: PASS — All 21 stories linked to features
traceability.no_unimplemented_features: PASS — All 12 features have implementing tasks

quality.executable_evaluation_criteria: PASS — All phase criteria are CLI commands (npx vitest, npx tsc, curl)
quality.testable_acceptance_criteria: PASS — All task criteria are specific and verifiable
quality.sufficient_implementation_notes: PASS — All tasks have detailed implementation guidance
quality.files_specified: PASS — All tasks specify Files to Create/Modify or note verification-only
quality.realistic_dependencies: PASS — No forward references in dependency graph
quality.estimated_scope_provided: PASS — All tasks have estimated scope
quality.no_task_exceeds_3h: PASS — Largest task is 2 hours (T063: ReAct Agent Loop)

anti_patterns.no_verbatim_prd_copy: PASS — Phase docs reference PRD sections, no copied text
anti_patterns.no_vague_criteria: PASS — No instances of 'works correctly' or 'functions properly'
anti_patterns.no_tasks_without_criteria: PASS — All 86 tasks have acceptance criteria
anti_patterns.no_monolithic_phases: PASS — Max phase size is 20 tasks (Phase 4, after fix)
anti_patterns.no_missing_dependencies: PASS — All task dependencies are explicitly listed
anti_patterns.no_tasks_without_files: PASS — All tasks specify files or mark as verification-only
anti_patterns.testing_integrated: PASS — Test tasks in every phase (T014, T019, T025, T029, T034, T040, T046, T067, T068, T075, T096, T106, T111)
anti_patterns.no_orphan_tasks: PASS — Duplicate of traceability check, confirmed passing
anti_patterns.all_phases_have_evaluation: PASS — All 6 phase docs have evaluation criteria sections

cross_validation.pass_1_forward: PASS — All PRD requirements in V1 scope trace through to implementation tasks. Sections 5-8, 11-15 fully covered. Messaging (WhatsApp/Instagram/Email) and Voice correctly excluded as non-goals.
cross_validation.pass_2_backward: PASS — All tasks trace back to PRD requirements. Infrastructure tasks (Phase 0) and quality gates (Phase 5) are legitimate support tasks without direct PRD mapping.
cross_validation.pass_3_internal: PASS — All cross-references verified: feature IDs, user story IDs, task IDs, phase document links, dependency chains. No mismatches, broken references, or dependency cycles after fixes applied.

summary: All 38 verification checks pass. 2 issues found and fixed in 1 iteration: (1) T092 incorrectly referenced US-15 instead of US-14 in phase4_interface_layer.md, (2) Phase 4 had 22 tasks exceeding the 20-task limit, resolved by merging T095 into T091 and T110 into T108.
